title: Todo Reducer
description: Implement a task management reducer function to handle 'ADD' and 'REMOVE' actions.
problemStatement:
Complex state logic! Write a reducer function `todoReducer(state, action)` that handles an `'ADD_TODO'` action by appending `action.payload` to the state array.

**Requirement:** Return a new state array, don't mutate the original.
hints: Always return a new object or array from your reducer functions.
expectedOutput: A clean reducer function handling addition of items
